plan.title: FM ValueScout — CSV Parser & Scouting View

tasks.description: Add rusqlite (bundled feature), csv, encoding_rs, regex, and once_cell crates to Cargo.toml dependencies
tasks.acceptance: Cargo.toml contains all five crates with correct feature flags

tasks.description: Create src-tauri/src/db.rs with full schema: players (uid, name, nation, height, left_foot, right_foot), player_positions (uid, canonical_position), seasons (id, name, in_game_date, import_date, filename, player_count), season_players (id, season_id, uid, club, position_raw, age, minutes + 82 metric columns), season_player_positions (season_id, uid, canonical_position), player_percentiles (season_id, uid, metric_name, pool_type, canonical_position, percent_rank), archetypes (id, name, base_position, metric_weights_json), archetype_scores (season_id, uid, archetype_id, quality_score, value_score)
tasks.acceptance: db.rs exports create_tables() function producing all 8 tables with correct column types and constraints

tasks.description: Implement database init: open SQLite connection with WAL mode, run create_tables, store as Tauri managed state, wire into lib.rs run()
tasks.acceptance: App starts, database file created, tables exist, idempotent on re-runs

tasks.description: Create src-tauri/src/parsers/mod.rs with FieldValue enum, PlayerRecord struct (82+ fields), Schema struct (parsers registry + column name → index HashMap)
tasks.acceptance: parsers/mod.rs exports FieldValue enum with Int/Float/String/Currency/Wage/Appearances/Position/FootScore/Null variants, PlayerRecord struct, and Schema::from_headers() builder

tasks.description: Implement currency/magnitude parser: strip any currency symbol (€£$), apply K/M/B magnitude multipliers, extract upper bound from ranges (€160M-€210M → 210M), handle decimal before magnitude (€19.25K)
Implement wage denomination parser: extract numeric value with magnitude multiplier and denomination suffix (p/w, p/m, p/a) as separate fields
tasks.acceptance: €74K p/w→value=74000 denom=p/w, €36.5K p/w→value=36500 denom=p/w, €28M→value=28000000 denom=NULL

tasks.description: Implement unit-stripping parser for fields with cm/km suffixes; apply field-specific precision (height=int, distance=1dp, xG=2dp)
Implement nationality code mapper using phf compile-time hash map: 3-letter codes → full names, preserve already-full names as-is
tasks.acceptance: UKR→Ukraine, ESP→Spain, Spain→Spain (unchanged), Ireland→Ireland (unchanged)

tasks.description: Implement position string splitter: split comma-separated position string into Vec<String>
tasks.acceptance: D (LC), WB/M (L)→['D (LC)','WB/M (L)'], GK→['GK']

tasks.description: Implement footedness parser: map Very Strong→20, Fairly Strong→15, Reasonable→10, Weak→5; store raw string; unrecognized→score=NULL
tasks.acceptance: Very Strong→score=20 raw=Very Strong, Weak→score=5, Unknown→score=NULL raw=Unknown

tasks.description: Implement appearances parser: extract starts and substitute counts from '43 (3)' format; bare number→subs=0
tasks.acceptance: 43 (3)→starts=43 subs=3, 39→starts=39 subs=0, 0 (0)→starts=0 subs=0

tasks.description: Implement computed metrics: per-90 from totals (total/minutes×90), totals from per-90 (per90×minutes/90), ratios (completed/attempted); division by zero→0
tasks.acceptance: Goals=10 minutes=900→per90=1.0, denominator=0→ratio=0, minutes=0→all per90=0

tasks.description: Implement CSV row validator: reject missing UID, missing player name, duplicate UID within same import, invalid numeric field values; return specific rejection reasons
tasks.acceptance: Validator returns Vec<RejectionReason> with specific messages per failure mode; empty Vec = valid row

tasks.description: Implement full row parser orchestrating all field parsers into PlayerRecord; detect optional CA/PA columns from header; handle empty cells→NULL
tasks.acceptance: parse_row returns Result<PlayerRecord,Vec<RejectionReason>> with all 82+ fields populated or NULL for absent columns

tasks.description: Implement encoding detection utility: try UTF-8 decode first, fall back to Windows-1252/Latin-1; strip BOM prefix before CSV reading
tasks.acceptance: decode_file returns clean UTF-8 Vec<u8> for both UTF-8+BOM and Latin-1 inputs

tasks.description: Implement import_csv Tauri command: read file via dialog, detect encoding, stream CSV with csv crate (delimiter b';'), parse each row through pipeline, batch insert 1000 rows per transaction, emit progress events, atomic full-transaction with rollback on error, return ImportSummary
tasks.acceptance: Command spawns blocking work, emits progress events every 1000 rows, returns player_count/rejected/reasons on success, rollback on crash

tasks.description: Implement get_seasons Tauri command returning all past imports (id, name, in_game_date, import_date, filename, player_count) ordered by import_date desc
tasks.acceptance: Returns JSON array of season records; empty array when no imports exist

tasks.description: Register all Tauri commands (import_csv, get_seasons) in lib.rs builder, initialize database on app startup, store connection in Tauri managed state
tasks.acceptance: lib.rs invoke_handler includes import_csv and get_seasons; db initialized before first command

tasks.description: Add Tauri capabilities: dialog:default and fs:read with allowed paths to src-tauri/capabilities/default.json for file picker and CSV reading
tasks.acceptance: default.json permissions include core:default, opener:default, dialog:default, fs:read

tasks.description: Create src/routes/import/+page.svelte: glassmorphism-styled drop zone with file picker via Tauri dialog, in-game date input (three dropdowns day/month/year), import button disabled until file+date ready, progress bar showing processed/rejected counts, post-import summary card with success/error states, empty state ('Drop CSV or browse'), error state ('Not a valid FM CSV'), copying per spec
tasks.acceptance: Full import UX: select file → enter date → import → progress updates → summary with player count and rejections

tasks.description: Create src/routes/+layout.svelte with glassmorphism navigation shell: nav bar with Import and Scouting links, app header, wrapper slot for page content
tasks.acceptance: Layout renders nav bar on every page; Import and Scouting links navigate correctly

tasks.description: Update src/routes/+page.svelte as landing page: replace default Tauri greet template with welcome message, app description, and prominent CTA button linking to /import
tasks.acceptance: Home page shows welcome heading + CTA; no Tauri greet content remains

tasks.description: Implement percentile computation: for each metric, compute PERCENT_RANK() partitioned by canonical_position (position pool) and unpartitioned (all pool), insert into player_percentiles table; run at import completion in same transaction
tasks.acceptance: player_percentiles populated with both pool_type=position and pool_type=all rows for every metric per player per season

tasks.description: Implement quality score computation: for a given archetype (metric_weights map), load each metric's percentile, compute weighted sum Σ(weight × percentile), normalize to 0-100; support inverted metrics (use 1.0 - percent_rank)
tasks.acceptance: compute_quality_score returns 0-100; inverted metrics use descending percentile; all-NULL metrics→player excluded

tasks.description: Implement value score computation: compute transfer value percentile across all players, apply linear multiplier 1.5→0.5 as value percentile goes 0→1; no-value players treated as cheapest percentile (×1.5)
tasks.acceptance: Cheapest 10%→×1.5, most expensive 10%→×0.5, mid→linear interpolation; no-value→cheapest

tasks.description: Implement archetype score pre-computation: at import completion, iterate all archetypes×all players, compute quality and value scores via tasks 5.2/5.3, bulk insert into archetype_scores table
tasks.acceptance: After import, archetype_scores table contains quality_score and value_score for every archetype×player combination

tasks.description: Implement get_archetypes Tauri command: query archetypes table, parse metric_weights JSON, return all archetype definitions with name, base_position, weighted metrics list, and in/out-of-possession variant labels
tasks.acceptance: Command returns JSON array of archetype objects with name, base_position, metrics[] (name+weight+inverted), in_possession flag

tasks.description: Implement get_scouting_results Tauri command: query archetype_scores filtered by position (via season_player_positions), archetype_id, and pool_type; apply minutes≥1000 filter and own-club exclusion; return sorted by active score mode with tiebreaker; include top-weighted archetype metrics for display
tasks.acceptance: Command returns sorted Vec<ScoutingResult> with player info, quality_score, value_score, and top metric values; respects pool toggle and exclusions

phases.name: Scouting View UI — Core & Database View (Svelte 5)

tasks.description: Create src/routes/scouting/+page.svelte: glassmorphism-styled scouting page with mode selector segmented control (Database View / Role Search tabs), toolbar area for controls, content area for table/podium; default to Database View
tasks.acceptance: Page renders with mode selector; defaults to Database View; switches modes correctly

tasks.description: Implement Database View table: load all players from get_scouting_results (no archetype filter), display sortable columns with arrow indicator, color-coded percentile cells on red-yellow-green gradient, numeric sorting (not lexicographic), row hover highlight
tasks.acceptance: Table renders all players; sorting works on click with arrow indicator; cells colored by percentile value on gradient

tasks.description: Implement comparison pool toggle (Against Position / Against All) in Database View toolbar; toggling triggers immediate percentile recalculation via backend and recolors cells with ~300ms color transition
tasks.acceptance: Toggling pool swaps all percentile values and recolors cells; toggle persists as user preference

tasks.description: Implement player row click navigation: clicking any player row in Database View or future Role Search navigates to /player/[uid] placeholder page showing basic player identity (name, club, age, position)
tasks.acceptance: Clicking a row navigates to /player/[uid]; profile page shows player name, club, age, position

tasks.description: Implement position dropdown → archetype dropdown dependency chain: select position → load relevant archetypes from get_archetypes → populate archetype dropdown; select archetype → call get_scouting_results → display results; toolbar layout per spec (position left, archetype center, score toggle right, pool toggle far right)
tasks.acceptance: Selecting position populates archetype dropdown with only that position's archetypes; selecting archetype triggers search

tasks.description: Implement Top 3 Podium: three ranked player cards (1st center elevated with gold accent border, 2nd left, 3rd right) showing name (large), age, club, quality score, value score, transfer value; ranking driven by active score mode with tiebreaker; cards clickable to Player Profile; fewer than 3→placeholder cards
tasks.acceptance: Podium shows top 3 by active score mode; 1st card larger with gold accent; clickable; handles <3 candidates

tasks.description: Implement results table below podium: fixed columns (Name, Age, Club, Contract Expiry, Quality Score, Value Score) + top-weighted archetype metric columns (up to 12); sortable by any column header with arrow indicator; percentile cell coloring; row click navigation to Player Profile
tasks.acceptance: Table shows all qualifying players with archetype metrics; sortable; clickable to /player/[uid]; percentile cells colored

tasks.description: Implement score mode toggle (Quality/Value) with 300ms debounce, podium reorder animation (~400ms crossfade+translate), results table re-sort by new score column; toggle restores from user preference on mount
tasks.acceptance: Toggling reorders podium animatedly; rapid toggling coalesces to final state; label per spec (Quality/Value)

tasks.description: Implement scouting state preservation via Svelte 5 $state rune: mode, position, archetype, score mode, pool type, sort column/direction all survive navigation to Player Profile and back without re-querying backend
tasks.acceptance: Navigate to Player Profile → back → same archetype, mode, pool, sort order restored

tasks.description: Implement user preference persistence: store score mode and comparison pool choice in localStorage or Tauri store; restore on Scouting tab visit; position/archetype NOT persisted (reset each visit)
tasks.acceptance: Set Value+Against All → close app → reopen → defaults to Value+Against All on Scouting tab; position/archetype reset

tasks.description: Implement all empty states: no database imported (prompt with Import link), no archetype selected (prompt to select), zero search results (suggest adjusting filters), fewer than 3 podium candidates (placeholder cards), all rows rejected (detailed rejection display). Copywriting per spec
tasks.acceptance: Each empty/edge state renders correct message per spec with proper styling

tasks.description: Run cargo build to verify all Rust code compiles without errors; fix any compilation issues
tasks.acceptance: cargo build exits 0

tasks.description: Run bun run check (svelte-check) for frontend TypeScript type-checking; fix any type errors
tasks.acceptance: svelte-check exits 0 with no errors

tasks.description: Run pre-check batch (lint:check + secretscan) on all changed source files; fix any findings
tasks.acceptance: lint:check passes, secretscan clean

tasks.description: Implement unit-stripping parser for fields with cm/km suffixes; apply field-specific precision (height=int, distance=1dp, xG=2dp)

tasks.acceptance: UKR to Ukraine, ESP to Spain, Spain to Spain (unchanged), Ireland to Ireland (unchanged)

tasks.description: Implement position string splitter: split comma-separated position string into Vec<String>
tasks.acceptance: D (LC), WB/M (L) to ['D (LC)','WB/M (L)'], GK to ['GK']

tasks.description: Implement appearances parser: extract starts and substitute counts from '43 (3)' format; bare number to subs=0

tasks.description: Implement computed metrics: per-90 from totals (total/minutes*90), totals from per-90 (per90*minutes/90), ratios (completed/attempted); division by zero to 0; store negative floats for xG OP/xGP

tasks.description: Implement CSV row validator: reject missing UID, missing player name, duplicate UID within same import, invalid numeric field values; return specific rejection reasons
tasks.acceptance: Validator returns Vec<RejectionReason> with specific messages per failure mode; empty Vec = valid row

tasks.description: Implement full row parser orchestrating all field parsers into PlayerRecord; detect optional CA/PA columns from header; handle empty cells to NULL; includes Contract Expiry (Expires) field parsed as date string

tasks.description: Implement position expansion: map compound position strings to canonical codes. Rules: D(LC) to [DC,DL], WB/M(L) to [WB_L,M_L], D(RC)/WB(R) to [DC,DR,WB_R]. tasks.acceptance: decode_file returns clean UTF-8 Vec<u8> for both UTF-8+BOM and Latin-1 inputs

tasks.description: Implement import_csv Tauri command: read file via dialog, detect encoding, stream CSV with csv crate (delimiter b';'), parse each row through pipeline including position expansion (2.12), batch insert 1000 rows per transaction into seasons/players/season_players/season_player_positions, emit progress events, atomic full-transaction with rollback on error, return ImportSummary
tasks.acceptance: Command spawns blocking work, emits progress events every 1000 rows, returns player_count/rejected/reasons on success, rollback on crash

tasks.description: Implement get_seasons Tauri command returning all past imports (id, name, in_game_date, import_date, filename, player_count) ordered by import_date desc
tasks.acceptance: Returns JSON array of season records; empty array when no imports exist

tasks.acceptance: default.json permissions include core:default, opener:default, dialog:default, fs:read

tasks.description: Implement set_managed_club and get_managed_club Tauri commands: store/retrieve user's managed club name in settings table (key='managed_club'). Used for own-club exclusion in scouting
tasks.acceptance: set_managed_club('Arsenal') stores; get_managed_club() returns 'Arsenal'; persists across app restarts

tasks.description: Implement set_preference(key, value) and get_preference(key) Tauri commands: generic key-value storage in settings table. Used by frontend for score mode, comparison pool, and other user preferences. Reuses the same settings table as managed club
tasks.acceptance: set_preference('score_mode','value') stores; get_preference('score_mode') returns 'value'; works for arbitrary keys

tasks.description: Create src/routes/import/+page.svelte: glassmorphism-styled drop zone with file picker via Tauri dialog plugin, in-game date input (three dropdowns day/month/year), import button disabled until file+date ready, progress bar showing processed/rejected counts, post-import summary card with success/error states, and managed club settings input from task 4.4. Copy per spec
tasks.acceptance: Full import UX: select file, enter date, import, progress updates, summary with player count and rejections

tasks.description: Create src/routes/+layout.svelte with glassmorphism navigation shell: nav bar with Import and Scouting links, app header, wrapper slot for page content
tasks.acceptance: Layout renders nav bar on every page; Import and Scouting links navigate correctly

tasks.description: Update src/routes/+page.svelte as landing page: replace default Tauri greet template with welcome message, app description, and prominent CTA button linking to /import
tasks.acceptance: Home page shows welcome heading + CTA; no Tauri greet content remains

tasks.description: Create managed club settings component: text input with label 'Your Managed Club' and save button invoking set_managed_club; loads current value via get_managed_club on mount; placed on import page or accessible via nav. Uses same glassmorphism styling
tasks.acceptance: User types 'Arsenal', saves, get_managed_club returns 'Arsenal', persists across app restart

tasks.description: Implement seed_archetypes() in db.rs: populate archetypes table with ~60 initial archetype definitions (name, base_position, metric_weights as JSON array). Each archetype with in/out-of-possession variants gets two rows. Run via INSERT OR IGNORE from DB init for idempotency. Modify db.rs init to call seed_archetypes() after create_tables()
tasks.acceptance: archetypes table contains ~60 rows after init; get_archetypes returns populated list; subsequent runs idempotent

tasks.description: Implement percentile computation: for each metric, compute PERCENT_RANK() partitioned by canonical_position (position pool) and unpartitioned (all pool), insert into player_percentiles table; called at import completion in same transaction
tasks.acceptance: player_percentiles populated with both pool_type=position and pool_type=all rows for every metric per player per season

tasks.description: Implement quality score computation: for a given archetype, load each metric's percentile, compute weighted sum of (weight * percentile), normalize to 0-100; support inverted metrics (use 1.0-percent_rank); for dual-variant archetypes compute combined score=(0.75*in_possession)+(0.25*out_of_possession); exclude players with all-NULL archetype metrics
tasks.acceptance: compute_quality_score returns 0-100; inverted metrics use descending percentile; dual-variant uses 75/25 split; all-NULL player excluded

tasks.description: Implement value score computation: compute transfer value percentile across all players, apply linear multiplier 1.5 to 0.5 as value percentile goes 0 to 1; no-value players treated as cheapest percentile (x1.5); transfer value of exactly 0 also treated as cheapest
tasks.acceptance: Cheapest 10% gets x1.5, most expensive 10% gets x0.5, mid linear interpolation; no-value cheapest; value=0 cheapest

tasks.description: Implement archetype score pre-computation: at import completion, iterate all archetypes from seeded archetypes table (5.0) times all players, compute quality (incl. 75/25 dual-variant) and value scores via 5.2/5.3, bulk insert into archetype_scores table
tasks.acceptance: After import, archetype_scores contains quality_score and value_score for every archetype*player with correct 75/25 combined scores

tasks.description: Implement get_archetypes Tauri command: query archetypes table, parse metric_weights JSON, return all archetype definitions with name, base_position, metrics[] (name+weight+inverted+in_possession flag)
tasks.acceptance: Command returns JSON array of archetype objects with metrics list, weights, flags, and in_possession variant flag

tasks.description: Implement get_scouting_results Tauri command: query archetype_scores filtered by position (via season_player_positions), archetype_id, pool_type, most recent season; apply minutes>=1000 filter and own-club exclusion (using managed_club from settings table); return sorted by active score mode with tiebreaker; include top-weighted archetype metrics
tasks.acceptance: Returns sorted Vec<ScoutingResult> with player info, scores, top metric values; respects pool toggle, minutes filter, own-club exclusion, deterministic tiebreaking

tasks.description: Register Phase 5 scouting commands in lib.rs invoke_handler: add get_archetypes and get_scouting_results alongside existing Phase 3 commands. Verify all commands are registered
tasks.acceptance: lib.rs invoke_handler includes all 8 commands; get_archetypes and get_scouting_results callable from frontend
